label: Join row lists
description: **Left** or **inner** join two arrays of **objects** on **leftKey** / **rightKey** (dot/bracket paths via **getByLoosePath**). Each side may be a row array or JSON string (**array** or single **object** as one element). Merge: **Object.assign({}, left, right)**; optional **rightFieldPrefix** renames right-side keys (e.g. `r_`) so they do not overwrite left fields with the same name. Duplicate join keys on the right: last row wins.

formSchema.label: Prefix merged fields from right (optional)
formSchema.hint: Each key from the right row is prefixed so it does not clobber the same key on the left.
